mapper.select: SELECT project_id FROM user_project_relation WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_project_relation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_project_relation (user_id, project_id, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{projectId}, #{createTime, jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_project_relation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND project_id = #{projectId}
